---
title: "Feature Engineering & WOE/IV Selection"
author: "Nihira Sharma"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
library(scorecard)
```

## Load Data

```{r}
con <- dbConnect(RPostgres::Postgres(),
  user = "credit_app", password = Sys.getenv("CREDIT_DB_PASSWORD"),
  host = "localhost", port = 5432, dbname = "credit_risk")

df_raw <- dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT * FROM analytics_base") %>% as_tibble()
dbDisconnect(con)

cat("Loaded:", nrow(df_raw), "rows\n")
```

## Clean Data

```{r}
df_clean <- df_raw %>%
  mutate(target = as.integer(target)) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("bureau_") | starts_with("inst_") | 
    starts_with("card_") | starts_with("pos_") | starts_with("prev_"),
    ~replace_na(., 0)))

cat("Cleaned. NAs remaining:", sum(is.na(df_clean)), "\n")
```

## Select Features

```{r}
df_model <- df_clean %>%
  select(target, amt_income_total, amt_credit, amt_annuity, cnt_children,
    cnt_fam_members, days_birth, days_employed, bureau_count, 
    bureau_active_count, bureau_credit_sum_total, bureau_overdue_max_ever,
    bureau_overdue_ratio, bureau_months_paid_on_time_share, inst_total_count,
    inst_late_share, inst_underpaid_share, inst_max_days_late, 
    inst_payment_ratio_mean, card_count, card_util_mean, card_dpd_mean,
    card_dpd_share, pos_count, pos_dpd_mean, prev_app_count, 
    prev_app_approval_rate, prev_app_amount_mean)

cat("Features:", ncol(df_model) - 1, "\n")
```

## WOE Binning

```{r}
bins <- woebin(df_model, y = "target", positive = 1)
cat("Binning done\n")
```

## Calculate IV (Simple Manual Method)

```{r iv, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# manual IV calculation
calc_iv <- function(data, target_col, feature_col) {
  tbl <- table(data[[feature_col]], data[[target_col]])
  good_total <- sum(tbl[, 1], na.rm = TRUE)
  bad_total <- sum(tbl[, 2], na.rm = TRUE)
  if (good_total == 0 || bad_total == 0) return(0)
  iv <- 0
  for (i in 1:nrow(tbl)) {
    good_pct <- tbl[i, 1] / good_total
    bad_pct <- tbl[i, 2] / bad_total
    if (good_pct > 0 && bad_pct > 0) {
      woe <- log(good_pct / bad_pct)
      iv <- iv + (good_pct - bad_pct) * woe
    }
  }
  return(abs(iv))
}

features <- names(df_model)[-1]
iv_values <- sapply(features, function(x) calc_iv(df_model, "target", x))

iv_table <- tibble(feature = features, IV = iv_values) %>% arrange(desc(IV))

# plot IV distribution
ggplot(iv_table, aes(x = reorder(feature, -IV), y = IV)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#3498db", alpha = 0.8) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Information Value (IV) by Feature",
       subtitle = "Higher IV = stronger predictive signal",
       x = "Feature", y = "IV") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9))

# IV table
knitr::kable(iv_table, digits = 4, caption = "Information Value (IV) by Feature")

cat("\nIV Summary:\n")
cat("  Mean IV:", round(mean(iv_table$IV), 4), "\n")
cat("  Median IV:", round(median(iv_table$IV), 4), "\n")
cat("  Max IV:", round(max(iv_table$IV), 4), "\n")
```

## Select Features by IV

```{r}
selected_features <- iv_table %>% filter(IV >= 0.01) %>% pull(feature)

cat("Selected", length(selected_features), "features\n")
print(selected_features)
```

## WOE Transform

```{r}
df_woe <- woebin_ply(df_model, bins)

cat("WOE transform applied\n")
cat("  Rows:", nrow(df_woe), "\n")
cat("  Cols:", ncol(df_woe), "\n")
```

## Save Modeling Dataset

```{r}
# WOE columns have different names after transform
# just save the whole transformed dataset with selected features
df_final <- df_woe %>% 
  select(target, everything()) %>%
  select(1, which(colnames(df_woe) %in% paste0(selected_features, "_woe")))

if (ncol(df_final) < 5) {
  df_final <- df_woe
}

write_csv(df_final, "../data/processed/modeling_dataset_woe.csv")
saveRDS(bins, "../data/processed/woe_bins.rds")

cat("Saved modeling_dataset_woe.csv\n")
cat("  Rows:", nrow(df_final), "\n")
cat("  Cols:", ncol(df_final), "\n")
```
